report.summary: UX-audited and polished 2 new learn guides (onchain identity, leveraged tokens) — fixed missing OG metadata, added responsive typography, improved breadcrumb navigation with Home link and ARIA labels, and added back-to-top links.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Leveraged Tokens page: Added missing OG image URL and Twitter card image to metadata (og-leveraged-tokens-guide-2026.svg was created but not referenced)
Onchain Identity page: Made title responsive with text-4xl md:text-5xl (was fixed text-5xl, too large on mobile)
Both pages: Added Home link to breadcrumb navigation for proper wayfinding
Both pages: Added aria-label='Breadcrumb' to nav elements and aria-hidden='true' to separator characters for screen reader accessibility
Both pages: Changed root wrapper to semantic <article> element (leveraged tokens was using <div>)
Both pages: Added 'Back to top' link at page bottom for long-scroll usability

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: onchain-identity-reputation-guide-2026 (1200x630) — verified valid SVG with identity-themed decorative elements (fingerprint circles, verification checkmark, ID card outline)
OG image: leveraged-tokens-guide-2026 (1200x630) — verified valid SVG with leverage-themed arrows and multiplier symbols

sections.title: Audit Notes (No Action Needed)
items: Both pages follow degen0x dark theme consistently (#0d1117 bg, #c9d1d9 text, #58a6ff links)
Tables use overflow-x-auto for mobile horizontal scroll — good pattern
FAQ sections well-structured with card-based layout — rich snippet opportunity noted for future StructuredData integration
Content hierarchy follows scan-first principle: gradient title > subtitle > reading time > TOC > sections
Related articles grids use responsive md:grid-cols-2 and md:grid-cols-3 — mobile-safe
